heading: Log Lines
body:
Functions can log information using JavaScript's `console.log()`
method. Atlas stringifies each console log and stores each string
as a single line. Atlas truncates lines to 512 bytes in length.
For ASCII character sets, this translates to 512 characters; depending
on the character set you use, you may see truncation at lower character
counts.

Atlas saves only the first 25 log lines for a given log entry.
